steps.t: Isdi is at the ruins of Edhelion, near Thorin's Hall. Isdi is waiting for you to return with the first set of components.
Isdi is at the ruins of Edhelion, near Thorin's Hall. Isdi is waiting for you to return with the second set of components.
Isdi is at the ruins of Edhelion, near Thorin's Hall. Isdi is waiting for you to return with the last set of components.
